title: World Faiths
description: Discover the true meaning to the world's different faiths, so you can find common ground in your personal relationships,

tips.title: There are lots of places of worship young people could visit for number 1, including a Gurdwara, Temple, Mosque, Church or Synagogue.
The 'major world faiths' are widely accepted to include Judaism, Hinduism, Islam, Christianity, Buddhism and Sikhism.
tips.details: However, this is not an exhaustive list and a broader list of more religions can be found via [BBC Religion](http://www.bbc.co.uk/religion/religions/) pages, which also includes numerically smaller groups, such as Shinto and Taoism.

tips.title: A useful interactive resource to support young people to explore world faiths is BBC Bitesize
tips.details: There is a wealth of videos and animations which explore specific elements of different religions eg. What is it like to go Hajj, or what happens at Passover specifically aimed at young people. [BBC Bitesize](http://www.bbc.co.uk/education/subjects/z7hs34j)
